name: This is a Robery
description:
During the Rhino activation, he may spend 4 POWER to play this card.

Choose an enemy character within RANGE 1 that is holding Objective token. The chosen character drops any Objetive tokens it is holding. Rhino then Throws the chosen character MEDIUM.

name: Rhino in a China Shop
description:
Rhino may play this chard at the beggining of his Activation.

The next attack Rhino makes this Activation adds dice equal to the combined Size of all terrain features destroyed this Activation.

At the end of this Activation, Rhino suffers 2 WOUND.

name: A-Force Assemble!
description:
An A-Force character may spend 3 POWER to play this card.
When an allied character is defending against an attack this round, add 1 die to the defense roll for each other A-Force character within RANGE 2 of that character.

name: Well-Laid Plans
description:
Green Goblin and Doctor Octopus may spend 3 POWER each to play this card.

Roll 5 dice for each enemy character holding an objective token. The enemy character suffers one damage for each CRIT and WILD result rolled.

A character damaged in this way drops all objetive tokens it is holding. The player playing this card chooses the order in which enemy characters are affected.

name: Shadow Organization
description:
During the Power Phase, any number of allied Criminal Syndicate characters may spend 2 POWER each to play this card.

Enemy characters must be within RANGE 2 of characters that spend POWER to target them with attacks this Round.

name: All According to Plan
description:
During the Power Phase any number of allied Criminal Syndicate characters may spend POWER to play this card.

If 10 or more POWER was spent to play this card, take the Priority token.

name: Patch Up
description:
Choose a non-dazed allied character. Another allied character within RANGE 2 of the chosen character may spend up to 5 POWER to play this card.

Remove WOUND from the chosen character equal to the POWER spent to play this card.

name: Sacrifice
description:
If an allied character is within RANGE 2 of another allied character and its targeted by an enemy attack, those allied characters may spend 1 POWER each to play this card.

The non-targeted allied character immediately becomes the new target of the attack regardless of range and LOS. It cannot add additional defense dice to its defense roll and cannot modify its dice during the attack.

name: Lethal Protector
description:
When an enemy character targets an allied character within RANGE 3 of an allied Venom with an attack, Venom may spend 2 POWER to play this card.

Place Venom within RANGE 1 of the allied character. Venom becomes the target of the attack regardless of range and LOS.

name: Siege of Darkness
description:
Any number of allied Midnight Sons character may spend 2 POWER to play this chard.

Each character that spend POWER my immediately perform an attack with POWER cost of 0.

name: Bats the Ghost Hound
description:
When an allied Midnight Sons character is modifying its attack or defense dice, it may spend 2 POWER to play this card.

Change 1 of the allied character's attack or defense dice to any result. This effect may change FAIL results.

name: Brace for Impact
description:
If one or more allied characters would suffer a collision, they may  each spend 1 POWER to play this card.

Characters that spend POWER do not suffer WOUND from this collision.

name: Fall Back
description:
When an allied character is attacked, before WOUND is dealt it may spend 2 POWER to play this card.

This character may advance SHORT away from the attacking character.

name: Phases of the moon
description:
At the start of the Activasion Phase, Werewolf by Night may play this card.

Choose 1 of the following effects:

New Moon: This character must sppend 1 POWER before using the Midnight Massacre superpower. While this character is defending, if it is holding or contesting an objective token, it may reroll 1 die in its defense roll for each special condition the attacking character has.

Full Moon: This character cannot Interact with, contest, or hold Extract objective tokens. While this character is attacking, it may reroll 1 die in its attack rolls for each special condition the target has.

This character gains the chosen effect for the remainder of the game.

name: Séance
description:
Doctor Voodoo may play this card.

While Doctor Voodoo has his Brother Daniel token, add 2 additional dice instead of 1 to his attack, defense, and dodge rolls when adding dice for each CRIT result this round. While another character has his Brother Daniel token, that character does not add dice to its attack, defense, or dodge rolls when adding dice for CRIT results this round.

name: Covering Fire
description:
During the Power Phase, and allied Elsa Bloodstone may spend 2 POWER to play this card.

While this character is not Dazed, until the end of the Round, once per Turn, after the first time each Turn an attack targeting this character or another allied character is resolved ,if the attack is within RANGE 4 of this character, this character may roll 5 dice. If it does, it deals 1 WOUND to the attacking character for each CRIT and WILD in the result.

name: Recalibration Matrix
description:
When an allied character is attacking or defending, before the Calculate success or Failure Step, at the end of the Modify step of the attack, it may spend 3 POWER to play this card.

The attacking and defending character reroll all of their attack and defense dice.

name: Highway to Hell
description:
When an allied Ghost Rider begins an Advance during his Activation while within RANGE 1 of an enemy character, he may spend 3 POWER to play this card.

When Ghost Rider ends this move, Place that enemy character within RANGE 1 of him. The enemy character suffers the Incinerate special condition.

name: Carbonadium Synthesizer
description:
Omega Red may play this card.

Remove all special conditions from this character. It removes 1 WOUND and gains 1 POWER for each special condition removed in this way.

name: Psychic Fortress
description:
M.O.D.O.K. may spend 3 POWER to play this card.

M.O.D.O.K. gains Cover this Round. Allied characters gain Cover while within RANGE 4 of M.O.D.O.K. this Round.

name: The Best Defense
description:
Action: During Rescue's Activation, she may spend 2 POWER to play this card.

Rescue makes the Pulse and Repulse attack shown above.

attacks.name: Pulse and Repulse
special_rules: Before WOUND is dealt, push the defender Away SHORT.

Rapid Fire: After this attack is resolved, this character may make 1 additional Pulse and Repulse attack. The addicional attack must target the original target character. The additional attack does not have the Rapid Fire special rule.
